_readme: Home-screen tiles. Edit names/descriptions freely — the app reads this file fresh on every page load. 'link' starting with #/ opens a Hub page; a full http link opens in a new tab (external: true).

tiles.name: To-do list
tiles.description: Jobs we've written down. Tick them off as you go

tiles.name: Referral Letters
tiles.description: Write GP reports and specialist letters

tiles.name: Google Reviews
tiles.description: How many review invitations went out this week

tiles.name: Invoices
tiles.description: The few invoices that need a person — the rest do themselves

tiles.name: Payments to mention
tiles.description: Patients to gently remind about a balance when they're in

tiles.name: Credits we're owed
tiles.description: Sent something back? Log it — it ticks off when the money comes

tiles.name: Specialist letters
tiles.description: Reports about our patients — file each one with 3 clicks

tiles.name: Stock Orders
tiles.description: Suggested stock orders — look and approve

tiles.name: Lens Finder
tiles.description: Which lenses can make an Rx — cheapest option first
